text: I like the part about, so I think we just need to have something called the working program and then underneath it, what we're trying to do about RER, then underneath that about RER, then what you mentioned, public investment on setup RER in 2022. And then about Brydg and what we have done, how to tracking this thing licensed by British Business Bank, CBILS, et cetera. So I think we need the about RER, about Brydg, and then the working program, which is where...as RER builds, you know, something like new country, working with one of the oldest countries. Like that working program is a knowledge share of what the future looks like. And we can call this... Future, the future of land registries, something like that. So they'll all be wanting to do this and discussion of what the future of land registries should look like.
